zh.Cambrai, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Franc: 法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德坎布萊
zh.lifeSummary: Doda von Henneberg是Poppo V von Henneberg的女兒，於1002年出生在法國洛萊。她於大約1025年與Godefroid II de Basse-Lotharingie結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1077年12月21日享年75歲。

zh-hans.Cambrai, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Franc: 法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德坎布萊
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Doda von Henneberg是Poppo V von Henneberg的女儿，于1002年出生在法国洛萊。她于大约1025年与Godefroid II de Basse-Lotharingie结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1077年12月21日享年75岁。

nameMeanings.name: Henneberg
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Beate, Ewald, Kurt, Ulrich.
German: habitational name from any of several places so named.

variants.name: Henneberger
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Armin, Fritz, Gerhard.
German: habitational name for someone from a place called Henneberg (see   Henneberg  ).

variants.name: Henneberry
meanings: Americanized form of German and Dutch   Henneberg  .

nameMeanings.name: Doda
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Simplified spelling of   John   or a short form of   Jonathan .  The name is borne by the Canadian singer  Jon Vickers  (  b. 1926 ) and the American actor  Jon Voight  (  b. 1938 ).

variants.name: Jonathan
meanings: Biblical name, meaning ‘God has given’, composed of the same elements as those of   Matthew  , but in reverse order. This is the name of several characters in the Bible, most notably a son of King Saul, who was a devoted friend and supporter of the young David, even when David and Saul were themselves at loggerheads (1 Samuel 31; 2 Samuel 1:19–26). The name is often taken as symbolic of steadfast friendship and loyalty. Well-known bearers of the name include the Irish clergyman and writer  Jonathan Swift  (  1667-1745 ), British theatre director  Jonathan Miller  (  b. 1934 ), British actor  Jonathan Pryce  (  b. 1947 ), and British television presenter  Jonathan Ross  (  b. 1960 ).

en.lifeSummary: Doda von Henneberg was born in 1002, in Lorraine, France as the daughter of Poppo V von Henneberg. She married Godefroid II de Basse-Lotharingie about 1025. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died on 21 December 1077, at the age of 75.

fr.lifeSummary: Doda von Henneberg est née en 1002, à Lorraine, France, fille de Poppo V von Henneberg. Elle a épousé Godefroid II de Basse-Lotharingie environ 1025. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 21 décembre 1077, à l’âge de 75 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Doda von Henneberg wurde 1002 in Lothringen, Frankreich, als Tochter von Poppo V von Henneberg geboren. Sie hat um 1025 Godefroid II de Basse-Lotharingie geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 21. Dezember 1077 im Alter von 75 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Doda von Henneberg è nata il nel 1002 nel Lorraine, Francia come figlia di Poppo V von Henneberg. Lei sposato Godefroid II de Basse-Lotharingie circa 1025. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 21 dicembre 1077, all'età di 75 anni.

ja.Bouillon, Luxembourg, Belgium: ベルギールクセンボウルグボウイロン
ja.Verdun, Meuse, Lorraine, France: フランスロレィヌメウゼバーダン
ja.Torino, Piemonte, Italien: イタリアピエモントトリノ
ja.Cambrai, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Franc: フランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスノードカンブレイ
ja.lifeSummary: Doda von Hennebergは1002年にフランスロレィヌでPoppo V von Hennebergの娘として生まれた。約1025年にGodefroid II de Basse-Lotharingieと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1077年12月21日に75歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Doda von Henneberg(은)는 1002년 프랑스 로레이인에서 Poppo V von Henneberg의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1025년 Godefroid II de Basse-Lotharingie(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1077년 12월 21일 75세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Doda von Henneberg nasceu em 1002, em Lorraine, França filha de Poppo V von Henneberg. Ela casou-se com Godefroid II de Basse-Lotharingie aproximadamente 1025. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 21 de dezembro de 1077, com 75 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Doda von Henneberg родилась в 1002 г. в местности лорреаин, Франция. Её отца звали Poppo V von Henneberg. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Godefroid II de Basse-Lotharingie около 1025 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла 21 декабря 1077 г. в возрасте 75 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Doda von Henneberg nació en 1002, en Lorraine, Francia como hija de Poppo V von Henneberg. Se casó con Godefroid II de Basse-Lotharingie aproximadamente 1025. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 21 de diciembre de 1077, a la edad de 75 años.

th.25 February 1076: 25 กุมภาพันธ์ 1076
